title: chargeback — authorization policies
description: Two policies, one per owned entity. Chargebacks are admin-only surface — no customer-facing routes. Read access opens to finance + admin + owner + support roles; write access (evidence submission + RDR accept + manual mark-lost) restricted to finance + admin + owner. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the permission check; scope narrowing runs via the ResolveScope middleware (tenant context; no branch scoping — chargebacks are tenant-wide by design). Customer routes DO NOT EXIST — chargebacks are bank-initiated + surfacing chargeback state to customers may violate some card network rules.

abilities.scope: finance + admin + owner + support. Only when parent chargeback.status IN ('pending_evidence', 'evidence_submitted') AND parent chargeback.evidence_due_by > NOW(). Requires `chargeback_evidence_submission` entitlement.
finance + admin + owner. Only when parent chargeback.rdr_eligible=true AND parent chargeback.status='pending_evidence'. Requires `chargeback_rdr` entitlement (Medium+).

admin + owner. Escape hatch — manually mark a chargeback as lost after ops investigation determined defense is not viable. Only allowed when parent chargeback.status IN ('pending_evidence', 'evidence_submitted', 'under_bank_review'). Records decision_reason for audit trail.
admin + owner + finance. Dispatches ReconcileChargebacksJob (delegates to CheckChargebackStatusJob per-provider).
finance + admin + owner + marketing (read-only for fraud model tuning). Rate report + reason distribution + provider distribution.
finance + admin + owner + support. Confidential financial fields (amount_cents, currency, fee_cents, provider_metadata) are redacted for readers without this permission.

finance + admin + owner + support. Evidence bundles may contain customer PII (IP address, device fingerprint hash, service dates, attendance records). Segregated permission — some support roles need chargeback context but not customer PII drill-down.
Stackra platform ops for cross-tenant merchant-account risk monitoring — surfaces every tenant approaching VDMP/MDMP thresholds.
Inherit from parent chargeback. If viewer can see the parent chargeback + holds view-evidence, they can see its evidence rows.

Inherit from parent chargeback's submit-evidence permission. Only allowed when parent chargeback.status IN ('pending_evidence', 'evidence_submitted') AND evidence_due_by > NOW(). Requires `chargeback_evidence_submission` entitlement.
DENY ALL. Evidence rows are IMMUTABLE at creation — corrections require submitting a new attempt with submission_attempt_number + 1.
DENY ALL. Evidence rows cascade via FK on parent chargeback delete only; direct delete refused. Retention pipeline handles hard-delete via PurgeExpiredChargebackDataJob.
